02211101001222000211201 - ASI: 18

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  11 = 1 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  001 = 0 * 01
  201 = 2 * 01
  211 = 2 * 11
  222 = 2 * 22
  0211 = 02 * 11
  01001 = 01 * 001
  02211 = 02 * 211
  22200 = 222 * 00
  101001 = 1 * 01001
  0211201 = 0211 * 201
  02211101001 = 02211 * 101001
  222000211201 = 22200 * 0211201
  02211101001222000211201 = 02211101001 * 222000211201
